title: Create default Booking Approval seeder and integrate notifications
acceptance_criteria: Database seeder creates a default 'Booking Approval' flow
Default flow has model_type set to App\Models\Booking::class
Default flow includes steps for: requester role and Admin role
BookingApproved notification still triggers on approval
BookingRejected notification still triggers on rejection
Seeder is idempotent (can be run multiple times without duplicates)
Seeder can be called from DatabaseSeeder.php
